title: Import PR #1 code files (bee.mjs dispatcher + registry + validator + tests + guard check d), vendor to .bee/bin, gitignore manifest-hash
action: Import the code-only files of PR #1 from the already-fetched local ref pr-1-vantt (commit aa8f543), per DA1/DA2 (decision 30606de4). (1) Extract verbatim with `git show pr-1-vantt:<path> > <path>`: skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/command-registry.mjs, skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/validate-args.mjs, skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs, skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs. (2) Write-guard: do NOT wholesale-replace. Apply ONLY the PR's additive check-(d) hunks (CLI-shape validation: LEGACY_HELPER_RE/DISPATCHER_RE constants, tokenizeCommand, splitCliSegments, resolveCliCommandName, parseCliFlags, checkCliShape, and the `if (toolName === "Bash")` block with its own contained try/catch) onto the CURRENT main hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs — main moved +110/-61 since the PR base (codex apply_patch parity), so obtain the hunks with `git diff main...pr-1-vantt -- hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs` and port BY HAND, adapting to main's API surface: (2a) logCrash is now 4-arg via hooks/adapter.mjs (logCrash(root, hookName, error, source)) — the PR's 2-arg `logCrash(root, cliError)` call must become the same call shape main already uses at its existing catch sites (read hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs first); a literal 2-arg port mis-logs and can throw INSIDE the containment try/catch. (2b) check (d)'s dynamic imports of command-registry.mjs/validate-args.mjs must resolve through the same lib-module path mechanism the current main file uses for lib imports (libModuleUrl or its current equivalent). (2c) Update the header comment from three to four checks as the PR does. (2d) If the imported test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs assumes the PR-era hook API (readStdinPayload/2-arg logCrash), adapt the TEST to main's adapter API while preserving every behavioral assertion — the asserted strings come from shared lib/guards.mjs which is unchanged on main. Then copy the resulting guard byte-identical to .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs (NOTE: the vendored copy is currently STALE on main — 192 diff lines behind hooks/ — and .claude/settings.json wires the vendored copy; this cell's sync intentionally fixes that pre-existing drift). (3) Vendor: copy templates/bee.mjs to .bee/bin/bee.mjs, templates/lib/command-registry.mjs and validate-args.mjs to .bee/bin/lib/, byte-identical (the standing sweep in test_lib.mjs enforces this pairing; templates/tests/ are NOT vendored — no .bee/bin/tests exists). (4) Gitignore: add ".bee/manifest-hash.json" to GITIGNORE_BLOCK_PATTERNS in skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs (keep list style) AND insert the same line inside the existing # BEE:START/# BEE:END block of the live .gitignore, keeping both consistent. Expect the imported test_bee_cli.mjs to be RED at this point (registry lacks cells.update; status copy predates 0.1.26) — hia-2 fixes that; this cell's verify runs syntax + vendor parity + gitignore + the GUARD HOOK TESTS (which must be green here — a mis-port fails at this cell, not at close-out), NOT the CLI suite.

truths: every imported file parses (node --check) and every templates file is byte-identical to its .bee/bin sibling
hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs still contains checks (a)-(c) exactly as current main had them; check (d) is purely additive with its own contained try/catch
.bee/manifest-hash.json is ignored by git (git check-ignore passes) and the pattern lives in both onboard_bee.mjs GITIGNORE_BLOCK_PATTERNS and the live .gitignore BEE block
prohibitions: NOTHING else from pr-1-vantt is checked out: no .bee/*.json(l), no .bee/cells/, no .bee/logs/, no plans/, no docs/history/, no docs/decisions (docs are hia-4's job)
the 4 legacy helpers bee_status/cells/reservations/decisions.mjs are not touched (vantt D5)
never run onboard_bee.mjs --apply in this cell

verify: node --check skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs && node --check skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/command-registry.mjs && node --check skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/validate-args.mjs && node --check hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs && cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs .bee/bin/bee.mjs && cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/command-registry.mjs .bee/bin/lib/command-registry.mjs && cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/validate-args.mjs .bee/bin/lib/validate-args.mjs && cmp hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs && git check-ignore -q .bee/manifest-hash.json && grep -Fq '.bee/manifest-hash.json' skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs

trace.outcome: Imported PR #1 code files verbatim from pr-1-vantt (bee.mjs dispatcher, command-registry, validate-args, 2 test suites); hand-ported the purely-additive check (d) CLI-shape hunks onto main's adapter-era guard (4-arg logCrash, libModuleUrl imports); vendored dispatcher+libs+guard+adapter to .bee/bin (fixing the pre-existing 192-line vendored-guard drift); gitignored .bee/manifest-hash.json in both onboard_bee.mjs and the live BEE block. Imported test_bee_cli.mjs left red by design (hia-2 adapts to 0.1.26).

deviations.what: Vendored hooks/adapter.mjs to .bee/bin/hooks/adapter.mjs (path reserved before write).
deviations.why: The ported guard imports ./adapter.mjs; the stale .bee/bin/hooks/ predates the adapter refactor and lacked it. Copying the new guard alone would crash every vendored-guard invocation (.claude/settings.json wires the vendored copy). onboard_bee.mjs HOOK_FILENAMES already mandates adapter.mjs alongside the wrappers for exactly this reason ('vendoring the wrappers without it would break their import'), so this matches onboarding's own vendoring behavior rather than inventing one.

  "tests_inspected": ["hooks/test_write_guard.mjs (main's 60-row guard suite: checks a-c + apply_patch rows)", "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs (imported, read in full before running)"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": ["skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs (imported verbatim from pr-1-vantt, 16 cases: check (d) deny/allow/parser edge cases, a-c zero-regression, forced-throw containment; needed no adaptation — it black-box spawns the hook via stdin payloads)", "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs (imported verbatim; intentionally RED until hia-2 — excluded from this cell's verify per the cell action)"],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this cell, git show HEAD:hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs reads 'Three checks in one guard, first hit wins:' with no check (d) — a malformed bee CLI Bash call (e.g. `node .bee/bin/bee_cells.mjs show` missing required --id) reached the shell unchallenged. The vendored .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs was additionally 192 diff-lines behind hooks/ (pre-adapter era, `diff <(git show HEAD:hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs) .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs | wc -l` = 192) and .bee/bin/hooks/ lacked adapter.mjs entirely.",
  "verification_run": "cell verify chain (4x node --check + 4x cmp byte-parity + git check-ignore + grep + both hook suites) -> imported suite: 16 passed, 0 failed; hooks/test_write_guard.mjs: ALL PASS (60 rows); exit 0. Guard diff vs HEAD confirmed purely additive: only removed line is the 'Three checks' header replaced by 'Four checks'.",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["test_bee_cli.mjs runs red at this cell by design (registry lacks cells.update; status copy predates 0.1.26 review block) — hia-2's job, stated in the cell action; it is imported and syntax-checked only."]
}
